rationale: In the citing paper, Gupta, Lehmann, and Stuart (2004) appears in a grouped introductory citation with Thomas (2001) as an example of prior work that conceptualizes and measures customer value in consumer settings. The paper does not use the cited article's valuation model, variables, or empirical approach in its hypotheses, study design, or analyses. Its core theory and evidence are based on self-determination and motivational psychology, so this citation functions as broad background positioning rather than a direct intellectual building block.
